profile.created.descriptionOwn: Geocaches you've hidden for others to find
profile.created.emptyDescriptionOwn: Start your geocaching journey by hiding your first one!
profile.found.descriptionOwn: Caches you've successfully found and logged
profile.found.emptyDescriptionOwn: Start exploring and log your first find!
profile.loadingDescription: Fetching user information from Nostr relays
profile.loginRequired: Please log in with your Nostr account to view your profile.
profile.saved.description: Caches you've saved for later exploration
profile.saved.emptyDescription: Save interesting caches to find them easily later!
settings.appearance.description: Choose your preferred theme and visual style
settings.appearance.themeDescription: Adventure theme uses warm parchment colors perfect for geocaching. System follows your device settings.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.description: Configure your app preferences and geocaching settings
settings.language.label: Language
settings.language.title: Language
settings.relay.description: Select the Nostr relay for geocaching data. Used for reading and publishing geocaches and logs.
settings.relay.title: Relay Configuration
settings.title: Settings
settings.wot.description: Filter geocache listings and logs based on your social network to reduce spam.
settings.wot.descriptions.all: All: Show content from everyone (filter disabled).
settings.wot.descriptions.lax: Lax: Include content from two degrees of separation.
settings.wot.descriptions.normal: Normal: Include content from people your follows follow (recommended).
settings.wot.descriptions.strict: Strict: Only show content from people you directly follow.
settings.wot.followLimitDescription: Ignore users with more than this many follows.
settings.wot.laxWarning: Lax mode may be slow to calculate depending on the following count.
settings.wot.startingUserDescription: The center of your trust network. Use a valid public key, or your own by default.
settings.wot.startingUserPlaceholder: Enter a valid pubkey (npub or hex)
settings.wot.title: Web of Trust Filter
